mapper.sql: id, task_id, volunteer_id, elderly_id, family_user_id, service_date, service_content, service_duration, service_photos, service_notes, family_feedback, rating, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT sr.*, u.full_name as volunteer_name FROM service_record sr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sr.volunteer_id = u.id WHERE sr.family_user_id = #{familyUserId} ORDER BY sr.service_date DESC
SELECT sr.*, u.full_name as volunteer_name FROM service_record sr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sr.volunteer_id = u.id WHERE sr.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_record WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId}
